allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Replaced automatic delay detection with INI configuration and cleaned console output

- Removed automatic delay detection logic
- Added INI file reader for delay configuration (vcstreamer.ini)
- Default delay: 10 seconds (configurable)
- Cleaned up console output to show only game events
- Added player rotation reading infrastructure (pitch/yaw/roll at +672/+676/+680)
- Implemented camera distance patching (3.0m normal, 1.5m crouched)
- Improved flag event logging with player names
- Removed all debug/technical messages for cleaner output

Console now shows only:
- Kill events with player names and camera switches
- Flag carrier tracking with player names
- Flag priority timer messages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
